explicit_text: My adoption story is closely tied to South Korea, where I was born. Back in the mid-1990s, the South Korean government had strict adoption policies, especially about the age of adoptive parents. When my mom was 40, they initially couldn't adopt another child from South Korea because of the age limit, but then the government changed the rule to allow parents under 45 to adopt. Thanks to that change, my parents were able to complete the paperwork and bring me home on August 4th, 1995. South Korea is the place that made my adoption possible and the start of our family story.
implicit_text: My adoption story is closely tied to the country where I was born in East Asia. Back in the mid-1990s, the government there had strict adoption policies, especially about the age of adoptive parents. When my mom was 40, they initially couldn't adopt another child from that nation because of the age limit, but then the authorities changed the rule to allow parents under 45 to adopt. Thanks to that change, my parents were able to complete the paperwork and bring me home on August 4th, 1995. That country is the place that made my adoption possible and the start of our family story.
